violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Top rail of salad make table found with temperatures of 44-49F. *Iced immediately.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. -Thermometer in bottom of salad make table stated 50F, however, foods were found at 37F. -Thermometer at under counter fryer refrigerator showed 44F, potatoes found at 32F.--Temperature measuring device was not provided. -No thermometer in top rail of salad table.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Cracked/damaged acrylic/plastic containers throughout kitchen. (Observed at make lines, at walk in coolers and in clean dish storage.)

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue at edge of meat slicer blade.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Splatter at upper interior of microwave (near hand sink). -Crumb/debris at door track of 2 door glass cooler next to pizza prep. -Some carbon build up at interiors of back cookline ovens.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some dust/debris at interior cabinet door at expo line compressor. -Dust/debris at fan of walk in freezer #1 and walk in cooler #4. -Dust/debris at gate in walk in cooler #2. -Residue at floor below back cook line equipment.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling at dry storage, above Walk in Freezer #1, has exposed insulation/missing tiles. -Some stained tiles above cookline (facility is changing out tiles when able).
